title: amaryllis × roseoalba
intro: Amaryllis × roseoalba is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Hippeastrum x johnsonii and Hippeastrum x rostratum, commonly known as the amaryllis or lily. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Amaryllis × roseoalba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe wounds. Herbal preparations of the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
